Privacy built in. Security by default. We never hold your keys, see your chats, or touch your funds.

We support your chain, your language, your lifestyle.

FacilPay moves with you — across every chain, every language, and every way of life.

One App.
No Borders. No Banks.

Through our integration with MoneyGram, the FacilPay app allows users to perform cash-out transactions worldwide.

182

countries: Your wallet becomes a global crypto debit card — accepted at partner merchants and locations worldwide.

The world’s first AI-powered messaging wallet.

Powered by Web3 Industry Leaders.

Let AI power  your payments.

FacilPay comes with an AI assistant that evolves with you. From chat to checkout, it personalizes your experience — like growing your own intelligent companion, one tap at a time.

Payment requests that feel like texting.

Layer 2 reliability with battle-tested protection.
